wiki.summary: First teased by PinkPantheress via TikTok on March 17, 2025, in “Illegal,” PinkPantheress describes a secret relationship that feels risky or wrong, alongside confusion, guilt, and the fear of being found out. Sampling Underworld’s 1994 song “Dark & Long (Dark Train),” a snippet of “Illegal” was played during Pink’s DJ set on The Lot Radio in New York on March 28, 2025. The track was then teased on Pink’s SoundCloud account. Read more on Last.fm.
